ae94ebc2122825259d4dda40d4360140.final_output:
According to Jason Lemkin, the SaaStr's Chief AI Officer, it can never go back to working without AI agents [Source 1]. He mentions that he couldn't return to manual tasks like SDR follow-up and research due to the benefits of AI.

However, Lemkin also notes that while AI-native companies are heavily reliant on AI, they still have a human layer involved in their operations [Source 2] and [Source 4].

Additionally, Paweł from The Product Compass highlights an interesting point about Claude, an AI model, getting smarter every session with the help of certain CLAUDE.md Blocks, such as the Decision Journal block that logs meaningful choices with full reasoning.

It seems that while AI is becoming increasingly prevalent in many industries, human oversight and involvement are still essential to ensure its successful integration.
